overall.description: A cinematic view of a gothic great hall from a video game, featuring floating candles illuminating long dining tables filled with students. The scene showcases dark stone architecture with large stained glass windows at the far end, lit by warm candlelight against the night sky visible through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and dining tables

events.description: a figure in white robes enters the frame and walks across the far end of the hall near the stained glass windows
the figure in white robes exits the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall from an elevated position near the entrance, overlooking the dining area

notable_agents.action: figure in white robes walking across the back of the hall from left to right behind the dining tables

entered.detail: hundreds of candles suspended in mid-air providing warm flickering illumination throughout the hall
long wooden dining tables arranged in parallel rows with students seated on benches
large gothic arched windows with blue tinted glass panels showing dark night sky outside
tall dark stone walls with mounted banners and flaming wall sconces
tall dark stone walls with mounted banners and flaming wall sconces
large stone fireplace with visible flames burning on the left side of the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady elevated view of a vast gothic great hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. Long dining tables fill the space with seated students, while large stained glass windows dominate the far wall. A figure in white robes walks across the distant background from left to right, passing in front of the blue-tinted windows before exiting the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a vast gothic great hall where warm candlelight contrasts with the cool tones of a distant night sky. It begins with a wide view of the cavernous space, capturing hundreds of floating candles that cast a soft glow over long dining tables filled with seated students. As the camera holds its position, the focus shifts toward the far wall dominated by massive, blue-tinted stained glass windows. The scene then captures a figure in white robes gliding across the background from left to right, passing before the intricate glasswork before finally exiting the frame.
